description_long: This object consists of several rectangular juice cartons, each with a bright orange-yellow color and decorated with swirling white lines and citrus fruit illustrations. The front of each carton features a prominent label area with the text 'Your Logo' and an image of an orange slice, suggesting a citrus or orange juice flavor. Each carton has a small circular opening on the top, with some cartons displaying a pink bendable straw inserted or placed nearby. The cartons are made of a glossy, laminated material typical of juice boxes, and their compact size makes them suitable for handheld use. The packaging is clean and modern, with a playful design that would appeal to a wide range of consumers. The cartons are shown both upright and lying on their sides, highlighting their boxy, stackable form.
description: A group of orange-yellow juice cartons with citrus fruit graphics, each featuring a straw and a 'Your Logo' label on the front.
description_view_0: Two juice cartons are stacked horizontally, while two stand upright, one with a straw inserted and the other with a visible label.
description_view_1: Two upright cartons are shown, one with a straw inserted and the other with a straw lying beside it; two cartons are stacked in the background.
description_view_2: The view highlights the tops of two upright cartons with straws, and the sides of two horizontally stacked cartons.
description_view_3: The cartons are arranged with two lying flat and two standing, showing the side and back designs, including the swirling citrus graphics.
